pr.title: Record: Scylla (novel tokenizer) + Legal Score-First TTT (val_bpb: 1.08056553)

output.summary: Combines a TokenMonster-derived Scylla tokenizer chosen via autoresearch with full-data retokenization metadata and legal score-first TTT evaluation.
techniques: TokenMonster-derived Scylla tokenizer tuned via autoresearch and proxy validation
Full-data retokenization bundle with metadata-driven byte accounting
Backward-looking legal score-first TTT evaluation stack
